title: CVE-2026-27435: WofficeIO Woffice RCE
summary: [P1] WofficeIO Woffice is vulnerable to a Missing Authorization vulnerability, allowing for remote code execution. No patch is available, and exploitation in the wild has not been reported. Why now: Lack of available patch (confidence: 0.80)
classification_reasoning: Vulnerability allows for remote code execution in WofficeIO Woffice.

enrichment.lede: CISA Adds One Known Exploited Vulnerability to Catalog.
